title: Langkloof storm wreaks havoc
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS AND VIDEOS - As if...
bodyText: [{"type":"intro_bold","text":"According to the shop owner, the wind suddenly picked up just after 16:00 yesterday afternoon, 5 February."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Breaking News Gallery Video","html":"Breaking News Gallery Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS AND VIDEOS - As if grappling with the ongoing drought was not enough, strong storm winds wreaked havoc in the Langkloof area yesterday, leaving farmers, business owners and residents to count the cost.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS AND VIDEOS - As if grappling with the ongoing drought was not enough, strong storm winds wreaked havoc in the Langkloof area yesterday, leaving farmers, business owners and residents to count the cost."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Tornado-like gusts tore roofs from buildings, damaged fruit orchards, stripped tons of apples and pears from trees, uprooted large trees and left several structures damaged."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“It was as if someone swept a giant hand over the trees and businesses,” said a shop owner from Noll. Our business was spared by the grace of God, but the wind caused total devastation across the entire town.”","html":"“It was as if someone swept a giant hand over the trees and businesses,” said a shop owner from Noll. Our business was spared by the grace of God, but the wind caused total devastation across the entire town.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to the shop owner, the wind suddenly picked up just after 16:00 yesterday afternoon, 5 February. “Massive trees look as if they were picked up by hand and twisted. Power lines were torn down. A large part of the Langkloof was damaged by the wind.”","html":"According to the shop owner, the wind suddenly picked up just after 16:00 yesterday afternoon, 5 February. “Massive trees look as if they were picked up by hand and twisted. Power lines were torn down. A large part of the Langkloof was damaged by the wind.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to a farmer in the Langkloof near Avontuur, who wishes to remain anonymous, the areas affected by wind and hail yesterday include the following: Louvain (farm), Molenrivier (area), Krakeel (settlement), and the towns of Joubertina, Noll and Tweerivier.","html":"According to a farmer in the Langkloof near Avontuur, who wishes to remain anonymous, the areas affected by wind and hail yesterday include the following: Louvain (farm), Molenrivier (area), Krakeel (settlement), and the towns of Joubertina, Noll and Tweerivier."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Their properties and orchards were not only destroyed by the wind, there was also hail damage,” the farmer said.","html":"“Their properties and orchards were not only destroyed by the wind, there was also hail damage,” the farmer said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Heimersrivier, Misgund and Klipdrift were also reportedly affected. Herold did not suffer damage, but according to information, their power supply is still down. Waboomskraal was not affected at all.","html":"Heimersrivier, Misgund and Klipdrift were also reportedly affected. Herold did not suffer damage, but according to information, their power supply is still down. Waboomskraal was not affected at all."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"SUPPLIED VIDEOS: Langkloof Storm aftermath – widespread damage captured"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"SUPPLIED VIDEOS:"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"WATCH:  Tornado-like winds wreak havoc in Langkloof in South Africa"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘Ons bring jou die nuutste Tuinroete, Hessequa, Karoo nuus’","html":"‘Ons bring jou die nuutste Tuinroete, Hessequa, Karoo nuus’"}]

Herold did not suffer damage, but according to information, their power supply is still down. Waboomskraal was not affected at all.","html":"Heimersrivier, Misgund and Klipdrift were also reportedly affected. Herold did not suffer damage, but according to information, their power supply is still down. author: Editorial team
teaser: According to the shop owner, the wind suddenly picked up just after 16:00 yesterday afternoon, 5 February.
featuredCaption: Photo of storage - and living units behind Noll Suprette affected by the storm. Photo: Supplied
